baseline.summary: Harness validation, lint, typecheck, and full Vitest suite passed: 19 test files passed, 1 skipped; 226 tests passed, 15 skipped.

pollCancelScopeCopy.summary: Calendar poll cancellation modal now explains that cancelling from one selected date cancels the full poll and all candidate dates, not only that date.

dbCheck.summary: Supabase contract check passed for 18 SQL files during the final guard run.

guardVerify.summary: Final verify guard passed after syncing this workstream: design guard passed for 1 guarded file, diff guard passed for 3 changed files, baseline passed, DB contract check passed, and evidence guard passed.

runtimeSmoke.summary: No app entrypoint, Auth/session/API bootstrap, package/runtime config, Supabase schema, or API route files changed. In-app browser visual check was attempted twice but blocked by Browser webview attach timeout.

issuesObserved: The poll option cancel button could be misread as cancelling only the selected date, even though the current API cancels the entire poll.
harnessImprovementProposal: No harness change proposed; this was product copy clarification covered by deterministic UI tests.
retrospective.reason: The work clarifies existing behavior without changing API, data, or runtime contracts.
